name: Firebase Auth
description: Firebase Authentication REST API provides backend endpoints for user sign-up, sign-in, token management, password reset, email verification, account linking, and user profile management using the Google Identity Toolkit.

auth.note: Pass your Firebase Web API key as ?key=[API_KEY] query parameter on every request.

capabilities.name: auth_signup
capabilities.description: Create a new user with email and password. Returns ID token, refresh token, and user info.

capabilities.name: auth_signin_password
capabilities.description: Sign in with email and password. Returns ID token, refresh token, and user info.

capabilities.name: auth_signin_anonymous
capabilities.description: Sign in anonymously. Creates a temporary anonymous account.

capabilities.name: auth_signin_oauth
capabilities.description: Sign in with an OAuth credential from a third-party provider (Google, Facebook, etc).

capabilities.name: auth_signin_custom_token
capabilities.description: Exchange a custom Auth token (created server-side) for ID and refresh tokens.

capabilities.name: auth_token_refresh
capabilities.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new ID token.

capabilities.name: auth_lookup
capabilities.description: Get user account information by ID token.

capabilities.name: auth_update_profile
capabilities.description: Update user display name and/or photo URL.

capabilities.name: auth_change_email
capabilities.description: Change the user's email address.

capabilities.name: auth_change_password
capabilities.description: Change the user's password.

capabilities.name: auth_send_password_reset
capabilities.description: Send a password reset email to the user.

capabilities.name: auth_verify_password_reset
capabilities.description: Verify a password reset code is valid.

capabilities.name: auth_confirm_password_reset
capabilities.description: Apply a new password using the reset code.

capabilities.name: auth_send_email_verification
capabilities.description: Send an email verification link to the current user.

capabilities.name: auth_confirm_email_verification
capabilities.description: Confirm an email verification code and mark the email as verified.

capabilities.name: auth_fetch_providers
capabilities.description: Look up all sign-in providers associated with an email address.

capabilities.name: auth_delete_account
capabilities.description: Delete the current user account.

capabilities.name: auth_link_email_password
capabilities.description: Link an email/password credential to an existing user account.

capabilities.name: auth_link_oauth
capabilities.description: Link an OAuth credential to an existing user account.

capabilities.name: auth_unlink_provider
capabilities.description: Unlink a provider from a user account.
